title: SpectrumPoint — Neurodivergent Profiling Platform
description: An interactive web application that visualizes neurodivergent trait patterns across a three-axis model inspired by ASD, ADHD, and OCD frameworks.

highlightBox.title: Project Snapshot
highlightBox.body: An interactive web application that visualizes neurodivergent trait patterns across a three-axis model inspired by ASD, ADHD, and OCD frameworks.

body:
**SpectrumPoint** is a full stack web application currently in development that reimagines how **neurodivergent** traits are explored and visualized.

Instead of using binary diagnostic categories, the platform applies a dimensional scoring model across three behavioural axes inspired by Autism spectrum disorder, Attention deficit hyperactivity disorder, and Obsessive-compulsive disorder.

Users complete a weighted behavioural assessment built on a 0–4 Likert scale. Each response contributes to axis scores which are normalized and plotted inside an equilateral triangle using barycentric coordinate conversion. The result is a visual neuro profile that highlights overlapping trait patterns rather than forcing categorical labels.

**Key Features in Development:**

* Multi step assessment engine with weighted scoring logic
* Normalized axis scoring (0–100 scale)
* Real time triangular visualization using SVG rendering
* User authentication and saved assessment history
* Pattern based trait summaries instead of diagnostic claims
* Ethical disclaimer system to prevent misuse as medical diagnosis
* Tech Stack:
* Next.js (App Router)
* TypeScript
* Tailwind CSS
* Node.js backend
* PostgreSQL
* Prisma ORM

SpectrumPoint is designed as both a portfolio demonstration of full stack engineering and a conceptual exploration of dimensional mental health modeling. The project emphasizes accessibility, ethical design, and data visualization clarity.

Status: In Development
